title: Clean, fully compliant Kentucky Straight Bourbon (distance-downsample, level 9, upright)
image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a clear glass liquor bottle with a rectangular front label. Visual style: vintage bourbon label, gold and black, ornate typography. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Old Cypress Distillery', 'Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey', '45% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Old Cypress Distillery, Louisville, KY'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
expectedSourceBehavior: All 8 fields PASS, 0 advisories, overall PASS
visualObservation: Visual note: label was photographed from too far away with severe downsampling. Camera orientation is upright (0 degrees).
